versus: {player1} and {player2}: thumb war! Loser drinks!
{player1} and {player2}: staring contest! First to blink drinks!
{player1} vs {player2}: who can hold their breath longer? Loser drinks!
{player1} and {player2}: rock paper scissors! Loser takes a sip!
Between {player1} and {player2}, the group votes: who's more likely to survive a zombie apocalypse? Loser drinks!
{player1} vs {player2}: first one to make the other laugh wins. Loser drinks!
{player1} and {player2}: who can name more countries in 10 seconds? Loser drinks!
{player1} vs {player2}: say the alphabet backwards. First one to mess up drinks!
{player1} vs {player2}: who can do a better celebrity impression? Group votes, loser drinks!
{player1} and {player2}: trivia! Name 5 countries starting with 'S'. First to fail drinks!
{player1} vs {player2}: who has the older phone? That person drinks!

challenges: {player}, do your best impression of another player. Group votes if it's good — if not, drink!
{player}, tell a joke. If nobody laughs, drink twice!
{player}, speak in an accent for the next 2 rounds or drink!
{player}, show your last selfie or take 2 sips!
{player}, let the group go through your recent emojis or drink!
The youngest player must compliment the oldest player or drink!
The tallest player must do 5 pushups or drink!
{player}, name 3 songs by the artist the person to your left picks, or drink!
{player}, describe your first crush without names. Group guesses — wrong guess = you drink!
{player}, say something nice about every player or take 3 sips!
Everyone point to the person most likely to become famous. That person drinks!
Everyone point to the worst driver. That person drinks!
Everyone point to the biggest flirt. That person drinks!
The last person to raise their hand drinks!
Everyone close their eyes and point to who they think is the funniest. Most votes drinks!
{player}, do your best TikTok dance or drink twice!
{player}, call the last person you texted and say 'I love you' or drink 3 sips!
{player}, let the group pick your profile picture for an hour, or drink!
Everyone must send a risky text right now or drink 2 sips!
{player}, say something embarrassing in a different accent or drink!
{player}, do your best animal impression. If no one guesses the animal, drink!
{player}, serenade the person to your right or drink twice!
{player}, let someone post a story on your social media or drink 3 sips!
{player}, eat something unusual that the group picks (from what's available) or drink!
{player}, hold an ice cube until it melts or drink!
{player}, keep a straight face while everyone tries to make you laugh. If you crack, drink!
The person with the most recent selfie shows it to everyone or drinks!
{player}, speak in rhymes for the next 2 rounds or drink each time you forget!
{player}, give a 30-second motivational speech or drink!
{player}, do your best celebrity walk. Group guesses who — wrong guess means you drink!
rules: New rule: no saying anyone's first name for the next 3 rounds. Violators drink!
New rule: no pointing for the next 3 rounds. Violators drink!
New rule: everyone must speak in questions for the next 2 rounds. Statements = drink!
New rule: no one can say 'drink' for the next 3 rounds. Say it = take a sip!
New rule: before drinking, you must make a toast. Forget = drink double!
New rule: you must clink glasses with someone before every sip for the next 3 rounds. Forget = drink extra!
New rule: everyone must use their non-dominant hand to drink for the next 3 rounds. Wrong hand = extra sip!
New rule: no one can use the word 'no' for 3 rounds. Violators drink!
New rule: everyone must address each other by a nickname for 3 rounds. Real names = drink!
New rule: you must wink after every sentence for 2 rounds. Forget to wink = drink!
New rule: no laughing for 2 rounds. Anyone who laughs must drink!
New rule: you must speak in a whisper for the next 2 rounds. Normal voice = drink!
New rule: before answering any question, you must snap your fingers. Forget = drink!
New rule: no one can look at their phone for 3 rounds. Anyone caught = drinks double!
New rule: everyone must do a small dance move before drinking for the next 3 rounds!
